confirm.title: AirPrint
confirm.description: Set up the AirPrint add-on running on {host}?

user.title: AirPrint
user.description: Enter the address of the machine running the AirPrint add-on.

init.title: AirPrint
init.description: Add or remove the printers you share with your phones.

data_description.name: The printer name shown when you go to print. Spaces are fine.
data_description.address: Pick a printer found on your network, or type its IP address. Leave blank to search for it.
data_description.location: Shown under the printer name when you go to print, e.g. Office.
data_description.emoji: Shown in front of the printer name. iPhones and iPads show this instead of a picture.

error.cannot_save: Could not update the AirPrint add-on.
